Note:
[8-bit] Global game state
0x01 = Game initial startup
0x02 = Game startup license screen
0x04 = Title menu screen
0x06 = Load game screen
0x0c = Level select screen
0x0e = Level start
0x0f = In game
0x10 = Pause
0x11 = Level end/ranking screen
0x12 = Shop options screen
0x13 = "Save game" option screen
0x14 = Game Over screen (Continue)
0x17 = Tutorial help screen
0x1a = Multiplayer waiting screen

[8-bit] Game state substate (see 0x0770)
=== In game (0x0770 = 0x0f) ===
0x02 = Default state
0x03 = Trial lost
=== Shop (0x0770 = 0x12) ===
0x0b = Option screen ("Igor's Tools & Relics")
0x15 = Item carousel (Tools or Relics)

[8-bit] Player state
0x02 = Standing still
0x03 = Moving
0x04 = Fast moving (hover)
0x05 = Bomb armed
0x06 = Charging for a big shot
0x07 = Firing a quick shot or start of charge
0x0e = Dying
0x0c = Teleporting
0x10 = Dead

[8-bit] Player substate (see 0x077c)
=== Fire action substate (0x077c = 0x07) ===
0x00 = Not firing
0x01 = Shot firing
0x02 = Shot fired
0x03 = Power shot fired
[32-bit] Player position: X coordinate
[32-bit] Player position: Y coordinate
[8-bit] Weapon charging frame counter (0x00 -> 0x3c for first time shots, 0x00 -> 0x38 for consecutive shots)
[8-bit] Amount of keys

[8-bit][Bitflags] Ailment (debuff) type active (0x00 = no ailment active)
Bit3 = Can't shoot
Bit4 = Confused
Bit7 = Health drain
[16-bit] Ailment (debuff) countdown timer
[16-bit] Invincibility frame countdown timer (2s after hit, 10s/20s/30s after tool use, 0xffff while bomb is exploding)
[8-bit] Current health
[32-bit] Amount of Atoms in bank

[8-bit] Tools slot 1
0x00 = Empty
0x01 = Bomb (red)
0x02 = Invincible (red)
0x03 = Decoy (blue)
0x04 = Uber-Decoy (red)
0x07 = Health Lv. 1 (red)
0x08 = Health Lv. 2 (blue)
0x09 = Health Lv. 3 (green)
0x0a = Health Maximum (black)
0x0b = Armor Scroll (black, +2 HP)
0x0c = Attack Scroll (black, +2% Attack)
0x0d = Force Scroll (black, +4% Force)
0x2c = Reflect Shot 1 (red)
0x2d = Reflect Shot 2 (blue)
0x2e = Reflect Shot 3 (green)
0x2f = X-Ray Shot 1 (red)
0x30 = X-Ray Shot 2 (blue)
0x31 = X-Ray Shot 3 (green)
0x32 = Doom Shot 1 (red)
0x33 = Doom Shot 2 (blue)
0x34 = Doom Shot 3 (green)
0x35 = Leech Shot 1 (red)
0x36 = Leech Shot 2 (blue)
0x37 = Leech Shot 3 (green)
0x3b = Magnet Shot 1 (red)
0x3c = Magnet Shot 2 (blue)
0x3d = Magnet Shot 3 (green)
0x3e = 3 Way Shot 1 (red)
0x3f = 3 Way Shot 2 (blue)
0x40 = 3 Way Shot 3 (green)
0x41 = Double Shot 1 (red)
0x42 = Double Shot 2 (blue)
0x43 = Double Shot 3 (green)
0x44 = Drain Shot 1 (red)
0x45 = Drain Shot 2 (blue)
0x46 = Drain Shot 3 (green)
0x50 = Bomb Level 2 (blue)
0x51 = Bomb Level 3 (green)
0x52 = Invincible 1 (blue)
0x53 = Invincible 2 (green)
0x54 = Medicine (red)
[8-bit] Tools slot 2 (see 0x07fc)
[8-bit] Tools slot 3 (see 0x07fc)
[8-bit] Tools slot 4 (see 0x07fc)

[8-bit] Relics slot 1
0x00 = Empty
0x10 = Reanimator
0x11 = Luck Ring (red, +1)
0x12 = Luck Gauntlet (blue, +2)
0x13 = Luck Amulet (green, +3)
0x14 = Armor Ring (red, +4)
0x15 = Armor Gauntlet (blue, +12)
0x16 = Armor Amulet (green, +36)
0x18 = Attack Ring (red, +2)
0x19 = Attack Gauntlet (blue, +6)
0x1a = Attack Amulet (green, +18)
0x1c = Force Ring (red, +4)
0x1d = Force Gauntlet (blue, +12)
0x1e = Force Amulet (green, +36)
[8-bit] Relics slot 2 (see 0x0800)
[8-bit] Relics slot 3 (see 0x0800)
[8-bit] Relics slot 4 (see 0x0800)

[8-bit][Bitflags] Shot modifiers 1
Bit0 = Unused?
Bit1 = Unused?
Bit2 = Unused?
Bit3 = Unused?
Bit4 = Reflect (all tiers)
Bit5 = X-Ray
Bit6 = Doom tier 1
Bit7 = Doom tier 2

[8-bit][Bitflags] Shot modifiers 2
Bit0 = Doom tier 3
Bit1 = Leech tier 1
Bit2 = Leech tier 2
Bit3 = Leech tier 3
Bit4 = Unused (tool not implemented)
Bit5 = Unused (tool not implemented)
Bit6 = Unused (tool not implemented)
Bit7 = Magnet (all tiers)

[8-bit][Bitflags] Shot modifiers 2
Bit0 = 3-Way shot (all tiers)
Bit1 = Drain tier 1
Bit2 = Drain tier 2
Bit3 = Drain tier 3
Bit4 = Double (all tiers)
[16-bit] Tool use timer (which one?)
[8-bit] Current tool selection (will loop through 0 to 3 if no tool available)
[8-bit] Total max. health (base health 0x0850 + relic bonus 0x0855)
[8-bit] Total attack power (base attack 0x0852 + relic bonus 0x0857)
[8-bit] Total force power (base force 0x0853 + relic bonus 0x0858)
[8-bit] Max. base health (without relics)
[8-bit] Attack level
[8-bit] Force level
[8-bit] Relic bonus: Additional max. health (Armor)
[8-bit] Relic bonus: Luck
[8-bit] Relic bonus: Attack
[8-bit] Relic bonus: Force
[16-bit] Normal shots fired
[16-bit] Power shots fired
[16-bit] Hits taken this stage (0 = no-hit bonus)

[8-bit] Direction facing
0x00 = Up
0x01 = Up right
0x02 = Right
0x03 = Down right
0x04 = Down
0x05 = Down left
0x06 = Left
0x07 = Left up

[8-bit] Character currently active
0x00 = Frank
0x01 = Drac
0x02 = Wolfie
0x03 = Mina
0x04 = Drew
[32-bit] Pointer to active decoy record (at placement)

[8-bit] Decoy state
0x00 = No decoy active
0x02 = Decoy active
[16-bit] Decoy timer (0xffff if no decoy active)

[16-bit] Level object 1 type (Start of level object table - pumpkins, enemies, items, switches. 4 bytes per object)
0x00 = Object cleared
0x01 = Small object (pumpkin, item, exit)
0x02 = Enemy
0x03 = Large object

[8-bit] Level object 1 subtype
0x1b = Enemy: ghost
0x21 = Pumpkin with "1"
0x2c = Metal pumpkin
0x41 = Enemy: walking pumpkin
0x73 = Level exit
0x76 = Door horizontal
0x77 = Door vertical
0x7a = Key
0x7b = Teleporter
0x7d = Switch

[8-bit] Object 1 live slot
0x00-0x0f = Index in live array
0xff = off-screen
[16-bit] Level object 2 type (see 0x0017c0)
[8-bit] Level object 2 subtype (0x17c2)
[8-bit] Level object 2 live slot (see 0x17c3)

0x00000001 = Atom on the ground
0xffffffff = empty

[16-bit] Total shots fired

[8-bit] Cemetery Level 1 ranking (ladder 1)
0x00 = Bronze (score < 500 or skipped)
0x01 = Bronze (score >= 500)
0x02 = Bronze (score >= 1000)
0x03 = Bronze (score >= 2000)
0x04 = Silver (score >= 4000)
0x05 = Gold (score >= 8000)
0x06 = Crystal (score >= 16000)
[8-bit] Cemetery Level 2 ranking (ladder 1, see 0x35b8)

[8-bit] Cemetery Trial ranking (ladder 2)
0x00 = Bronze (score < 25 or skipped)
0x03 = Bronze (score >= 25)
0x04 = Silver (score >= 50)
0x05 = Gold (score >= 100)
0x06 = Crystal (score >= 200)

[8-bit] Cemetery Shadow ranking (ladder 3)
0x00 = Bronze (score < 200 or skipped)
0x01 = Bronze (score >= 200)
0x02 = Bronze (score >= 400)
0x03 = Bronze (score >= 800)
0x04 = Silver (score >= 1000)
0x05 = Gold (score >= 2000)
0x06 = Crystal (score >= 4000)

0x04 = Silver (score >= 1000)
0x05 = Gold (score >= 2000)
0x06 = Crystal (score >= 4000)

Bit2 = Mina unlocked
Bit3 = Drew unlocked

[8-bit][Bitflags] Buttons pressed
Bit0 = A
Bit1 = B

Bit3 = Start

Bit7 = Down

[8-bit][Bitflags] Shoulder buttons pressed
Bit0 = Right shoulder button pressed
Bit1 = Left shoulder button pressed
